title: Accessibility - Large Text
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app text truncation or layout issues when Android Large Text accessibility setting is enabled
steps: 1. Go to Phone Settings > Accessibility > Display & Text Size > Larger Text, enable it and set the slider to maximum.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to Device Settings (Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name]).
5. Navigate to Audio Settings (Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings).
7. Navigate through ANC and Transparency Mode screens (if applicable).
10. Navigate through DFU (Device Firmware Update) screens.
expected: Text is enlarged and properly displayed throughout all screens. No text is cut off, overlapping, or truncated. All UI elements remain functional and readable.
